---
title: "#beginners_and_schools"
format: gfm
---


## 2021-05-07

*16:00:02 - @Aedin Culhane has joined the channel*
**Aedin Culhane** (16:00:02):
> set the channel description: This channel is a place to provide and discuss resources for teaching R and Bioconductor to high school, for undergraduate summer projects, or beginner resources to help welcome non-statistical/computational collaborators to R and Bioconductor

**Aedin Culhane** (16:00:34):
> The is a nice video of an 8th graders experience with R. I think the integration of google sheets and R might be a nice mini project for high school or summer students, who just want to learn how to make a few plots in R[https://www.rstudio.com/resources/rstudioconf-2020/a-high-school-student-s-journey-to-bring-r-into-the-classroom/](https://www.rstudio.com/resources/rstudioconf-2020/a-high-school-student-s-journey-to-bring-r-into-the-classroom/)
  - Attachment (rstudio.com): [A high school student’s journey to bring R into the classroom](https://www.rstudio.com/resources/rstudioconf-2020/a-high-school-student-s-journey-to-bring-r-into-the-classroom/)
    > My 8th grade capstone project introduced me to R. The project was a data visualization about breakfast tacos. I used R and other web based tools.


## 2021-05-11

*16:43:44 - @Megha Lal has joined the channel*

## 2021-05-23

*08:09:30 - @Jonas Schulte-Schrepping has joined the channel*

## 2021-06-04

*05:50:38 - @Flavio Lombardo has joined the channel*

## 2021-06-05

*17:21:00 - @KP has joined the channel*

## 2021-07-19

*16:51:21 - @Leo Lahti has joined the channel*

## 2021-07-23

*15:51:17 - @Batool Almarzouq has joined the channel*

## 2021-07-26

*20:17:20 - @Frank has joined the channel*

## 2021-09-06

*08:21:47 - @Eddie has joined the channel*
*08:35:37 - @Eddie has left the channel*

## 2021-09-27

*09:49:12 - @Mikey C has joined the channel*

## 2021-11-08

*03:18:40 - @Paula Nieto García has joined the channel*
*06:25:29 - @Marc Elosua has joined the channel*

## 2022-01-28

*00:44:04 - @Oliver Voogd has joined the channel*
*11:11:46 - @Megha Lal has left the channel*

## 2022-02-23

*10:46:26 - @Paulina Paiz has joined the channel*

## 2022-02-25

*16:19:50 - @Joshua Sodicoff has joined the channel*

## 2022-03-30

*06:46:11 - @Mercedes Guerrero-Murillo has joined the channel*

## 2022-04-12

*13:58:40 - @Vivian Chu has joined the channel*

## 2022-04-23

*15:55:15 - @Arda Keles has joined the channel*

## 2022-05-17

*20:48:34 - @Alan Aw has joined the channel*

## 2022-06-17

*17:23:50 - @George Odette has joined the channel*

## 2022-07-22

*14:44:59 - @Gary Sieling has joined the channel*

## 2022-07-28

*13:50:05 - @Krithika Bhuvanesh has joined the channel*

## 2022-10-10

*13:54:49 - @Mercilena Benjamin has joined the channel*

## 2022-11-08

*20:37:59 - @Nicolas has joined the channel*
*20:44:09 - @Nicolas has left the channel*

## 2022-11-23

*01:07:53 - @ashish tp53 has joined the channel*

## 2022-12-12

*04:47:47 - @Zainab Ashimiyu-Abdusalam has joined the channel*
*18:54:48 - @Carlos José Ferreira da Silva has joined the channel*

## 2022-12-20

*13:25:16 - @Krithika Bhuvanesh has left the channel*

## 2023-01-18

*13:08:53 - @José Basílio has joined the channel*

## 2023-01-21

*16:01:19 - @Hien has joined the channel*

## 2023-01-31

*15:06:57 - @Rebecca Butler has joined the channel*

## 2023-02-22

*19:32:35 - @Sue McClatchy has joined the channel*

## 2023-04-17

**Leo Lahti** (15:23:35):
> ***Multi-omic data analysis with R/Bioconductor: Oulu Summer School, June 19-21, 2023 (Mon-Wed)*** For program & schedule, travel tips, registration, and other details, see the
> course homepage[https://microbiome.github.io/course_2023_oulu](https://microbiome.github.io/course_2023_oulu)


## 2023-05-06

*14:03:50 - @Sarah Parker has joined the channel*

## 2023-05-15

*07:55:58 - @Michael Lynch has joined the channel*

## 2023-05-19

*23:35:43 - @Umar Ahmad has joined the channel*

## 2023-06-13

**Leo Lahti** (08:28:15):
> Any tips on good data containers for metabolome data? (or is SummarizedExperiment the way to go?)


## 2023-07-04

*06:17:46 - @Shruti Shah has joined the channel*

## 2023-08-02

*08:20:03 - @Beth Cimini has joined the channel*

## 2023-08-04

*17:38:47 - @irem Kahveci has joined the channel*

## 2023-08-10

*07:14:09 - @mahamtariq58 has joined the channel*

## 2023-08-20

*10:37:49 - @Federica Gazzelloni has joined the channel*

## 2023-08-28

*15:06:29 - @Abdullah Al Nahid has joined the channel*

## 2023-09-04

*16:50:20 - @Anna Lewkowicz has joined the channel*

## 2023-09-15

*04:53:08 - @Leo Lahti has joined the channel*

## 2024-01-24

*11:31:07 - @Manuel Barrios Izás has joined the channel*

## 2024-03-09

*20:18:37 - @Cherishma Subhasa has joined the channel*

## 2024-05-05

*05:08:01 - @Ifra has joined the channel*

## 2024-07-28

*07:39:32 - @Precious Orakwe has joined the channel*
**Precious Orakwe** (07:40:04):
> Hello, good day everyone, I'm happy to be here


## 2024-08-12

*11:18:11 - @Enrique Mondragon has joined the channel*

## 2024-10-18

*16:55:39 - @Oluwaseyi Ashaka has joined the channel*

## 2024-10-23

*17:45:49 - @Hong Qin has joined the channel*

## 2024-11-07

*22:09:26 - @Malvika Kharbanda has joined the channel*

## 2024-11-23

*01:04:49 - @Rachel Wise has joined the channel*

## 2024-12-29

*12:19:15 - @Andrew Su has joined the channel*

## 2025-01-09

*11:28:46 - @Ammar Sabir Cheema has joined the channel*

## 2025-01-25

*10:26:55 - @Rahman Nurudeen has joined the channel*

## 2025-02-20

*02:33:00 - @Mikaila Chetty has joined the channel*

## 2025-03-17

*09:25:46 - @Sunil Nahata has joined the channel*

## 2025-03-18

*14:26:11 - @Andres Wokaty has joined the channel*
*14:58:25 - @Nicolo has joined the channel*

## 2025-03-19

*02:37:26 - @Sivaranjani Balachander has joined the channel*

## 2025-03-28

*07:27:00 - @Khadija Juma has joined the channel*

## 2025-04-23

*08:37:35 - @Silvia González has joined the channel*
